highlights: Console access to an SCVMM VM via its Hyper-V host — a new "Console (via Hyper-V)" action
Reaches VMs on isolated customer networks a direct remote-desktop connection can't touch (even pre-boot); relayed by the on-site agent to the Hyper-V host
Secure attention (Ctrl-Alt-Del) one click away; reveal the applicable domain/shared credential to type at the console login (every reveal audit-logged)
Choose the RDP security mode (NLA default, or TLS) for direct connections whose server refuses the default negotiation
Governed by design — org-grantable connect permission, cross-org/cross-tenant impossible, every console session and credential reveal audit-logged
